_comment: Per-repo harness scope for jailed subagent dispatches (dispatch.sh auto-loads this when no --scope-file is given). It declares the managed `gate` custom tool so a jailed implementer SELF-GATES through the harness's managed lifecycle (own process group, timeout, guaranteed server/browser cleanup) instead of running uv/npm/playwright directly — which it cannot: in-jail those toolchains are owned by the runner uid, not the agent uid. write_allow is intentionally NOT set here; it is per-task, passed via dispatch.sh --scope globs.

tools.name: gate
tools.description: Run the full project gate (backend tests + tsc/lint/build + Playwright) with a managed server/browser lifecycle. Use THIS to self-check — never start a server or run uv/npm/node/scripts/gate.py yourself.
